title: La tienda del Pueblo Clothing Donations
description: We offer and collect clean, gently used clothing for the community. Find us at La Tienda del Pueblo, on 77th Street, a partnership between @csoc and the @34_Ave Open Streets Coalition.

title: QT Books Club: Juliet Takes a Breath by Gabby Rivera
description: For the month of May, we will be reading Juliet Takes a Breath by Gabby Rivera. No pressure to finish, read all or read some, come by and enjoy discussion of QTPOC books by QTPOC readers All book club selections will be offered 15% off when purchased at The World’s Borough Bookshop!

title: Creative Aging: Crafts for Older Adults Series (in Spanish)
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Manualidades para Personas Mayores (en español) English: Join us for a welcoming and creative series of workshops designed for Latinx older adults to explore craft, memory, and community. Through hands-on activities such as stitching, embroidery, sashiko, weaving, and painting, participants will engage in artistic practices that nurture self-expression, reflection, and connection with others. Each session […]
